title: The system shall detect the user's face using the YOLOv5 model.
description: The system shall use contours detection to detect the borders of objects, Gaussian blur to mute the image noise, Background Subtraction (BS) to separate the moving parts, and Histogram Equalization for image contrast optimization.

title: The system shall recognize gestures.
description: The system shall use threading for concurrent execution of tasks within a single process and multiprocessing for parallel execution of tasks across multiple processes.

title: The system shall track the user's hand.
description: The system shall use Background Subtraction (BS) to separate the moving parts.

title: The system shall support single-hand interaction.
description: The system shall exclude multiple-hand interaction.

title: The system shall allow users to customize actions for specific gestures.
description: The system shall use Histogram Equalization for image contrast optimization.

title: The system shall enable real-time collaboration by supporting interactions on the projected surface.
description: The system shall foster collaborative environments for business or educational purposes.

title: The system shall have low-latency.
description: The system shall analyze gestures and reflect the corresponding action on the projected surface.
